response: This code implements the Quicksort algorithm, a divide-and-conquer sorting method that recursively partitions the input array around a pivot element (chosen as the middle value) into three subarrays: elements less than the pivot, equal to it, and greater than it, then sorts the left and right subarrays and concatenates them with the middle one to produce a sorted array. It uses a three-way partition to efficiently handle duplicates by grouping equal elements together.
